opening_line: Hi - I read a review where Chris mentioned tidy finishes on a job with Greens Precise Plumbing & Heating ltd. That stood out.
source_quote: Have used several plumbers in the past, with varying success. Some were expensive, some were unreliable - it was always hit and miss. Thought I'd give Greens Precise Plumbing a shot as I needed a new toilet and hand basin plumbed in. Callum was great, he explained the requirements for the job, provi
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (Chris)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from Chris mentioned tidy finishes - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
